# Security Policy

## Reporting a vulnerability

If you believe you have found a **sensitive security issue**, please use GitHub's
private vulnerability reporting flow for this repository instead of opening a
public issue:

- <https://github.com/nathanmcnulty/nodoc/security/advisories/new>

Please include:

- a description of the issue
- affected files, workflows, or endpoints
- reproduction steps or proof of concept
- potential impact
- any suggested mitigation or fix

## Security issues and hardening suggestions

If the issue is **not sensitive** or is a general hardening suggestion, you can
open a regular GitHub issue.

Please avoid posting secrets, tokens, or exploit details in public issues.
